Moin moin 

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update textproc/expat2 to the just releaed 2.4.4 -- the patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-textproc-expat2-update-to-2.4.4.patch


mfg Tobias
